claim_summary:
Section 09 — Lo-MacKinlay variance ratio at q=2, 5, 10 per product/day.

Under iid increments VR(q)=1. |Z| > 1.96 rejects iid at the 5% level. VR < 1
suggests mean reversion at the q-step horizon, VR > 1 suggests momentum.

"""Section 09 — Lo-MacKinlay variance ratio at q=2, 5, 10 per product/day.

Under iid increments VR(q)=1. |Z| > 1.96 rejects iid at the 5% level. VR < 1
suggests mean reversion at the q-step horizon, VR > 1 suggests momentum.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import sys
from pathlib import Path

import pandas as pd
from _common import (fmt_section_header, per_product_per_day_records, save_outputs)

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / "autoresearch"))
from utils.stats import lo_mackinlay_var_ratio  # noqa: E402


def _vr(arr, q: int) -> dict:
    try:
        r = lo_mackinlay_var_ratio(arr, q=q)
        return {f"vr_{q}": r["vr"], f"z_{q}": r["z"], f"p_{q}": r["pvalue"]}
